articles.headline: World Cup final squads ranked: Of all 48 national teams, who can win this summer?

keyEvents.text: Goal! Anguilla 0, El Salvador 1. Santos Ortiz (El Salvador) right footed shot from very close range to the centre of the goal.
Goal! Anguilla 0, El Salvador 2. Brayan Gil (El Salvador) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Nathan Ordaz.
First Half ends, Anguilla 0, El Salvador 2.
Second Half begins Anguilla 0, El Salvador 2.
Substitution, Anguilla. Kion Lee replaces Lamar Carpenter.
Substitution, Anguilla. Tarique Jackson replaces Nicholas Loblack because of an injury.
Substitution, El Salvador. Enrico Dueñas Hernández replaces Santos Ortiz.

Substitution, El Salvador. Elvin Alvarado replaces Jairo Henríquez.
Substitution, El Salvador. Emerson Mauricio replaces Brayan Gil.

Substitution, Anguilla. Javis Jones replaces Jordan Deans.
Substitution, Anguilla. Varian Carty replaces Marley Ipinson-Fabien.

Substitution, El Salvador. Harold Osorio replaces Brayan Landaverde.
